use_cases: Allowing users to select a single numeric value within a defined range by dragging the thumb control
Adjusting settings like volume, brightness, or opacity in application interfaces
Filtering content by price ranges or numeric thresholds in data-driven applications
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible range slider component built with Base UI and Tailwind CSS. Features a minimal flat design with a track, progress indicator, and draggable thumb with focus states for keyboard navigation. Suitable for desktop and mobile interfaces requiring numeric value selection.
